# thoth_endpoint_stats (Data Source)

Reads aggregated endpoint fleet statistics.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `at_risk` (Number) At-risk endpoint count.
- `latest_version` (String) Latest expected endpoint proxy version.
- `managed` (Number) Managed endpoint count.
- `online` (Number) Online endpoint count.
- `proxy_outdated` (Number) Endpoints with outdated proxy version.
- `quarantined` (Number) Quarantined endpoint count.
- `stale` (Number) Stale endpoint count.
- `stats_json` (String) Raw stats payload as JSON.
- `total` (Number) Total endpoint count.
- `unmanaged` (Number) Unmanaged endpoint count.
